reviews.text: Angela with Simplify Telluride did an AMAZING job making our day perfect. She was easy to communicate with and very competent on the vendors and pricing in the area. We are from Wisconsin so being able to trust our planner while planning an out of state wedding was so important to us. We didn’t have to worry about a single thing on the actual day of the wedding and we were given tons of recommendations on things to do and places to eat in the area which we so appreciated! The day of our wedding ended up being a rainy one and Angela was there to save the day with umbrellas for everyone and we ended up loving the pictures with the umbrellas. We loved working with them and would highly recommended to anyone!

I can’t recommend Angela and the Simplify Telluride team enough. When my now husband and I got engaged we didn’t really know what we wanted. We just knew *where we wanted to get married. It took just one email and a zoom for us to connect with Angela. I mean, connect connect. She just got us. Our story. Our sense of adventure. Our love. She took all of that and helped us find vendors and craft details to make an intimate ceremony, tasty dinner and fun reception. Did I mention all at elevation 11,000? We had every season of weather on our big day and embraced every moment. Angela and team rolled with it all. She has stellar connections and experience and can make those dreamy visions in your head come true. Lean into the adventure. The mud comes out of the dress 😊 Thank you Angela. (photo credit: Jason and Daris,  check them out too)

Angela planned a wedding I photographed at the Peaks Resort and Spa in March and let me tell you—she is the BEST! She was on top of communication leading up to the day and made sure I was able to document the wedding well from start to finish. She is an incredible human and I would recommend her to every single couple planning a wedding in Telluride!

Our wedding would not have been possible without Mary Ellen and Simplify. Thanks to her expert guidance, tireless work ethic and creative talents, our wedding was more beautiful and fun than we could have hoped for. She handled everything with poise, professionalism, and a confidence that was contagious. We will forever be grateful to her for allowing us to enjoy our weekend and cherish time with family and friends - all we needed to do was show up!

Mary Ellen also did our floral arrangements which were so stunning. Elegant and perfectly suited to the venue. I was happy to give her creative license for all the decor and could not have been happier with how it all turned out.

If you need a total pro with beautiful taste, who is a delight to work with,  look no further. I would trust Mary Ellen with any event and can wholeheartedly recommend her for your wedding.

I would trust her with any event and can wholeheartedly recommend her for your wedding.

Angela and Deshka were absolutely amazing! From start to finish, they made the entire planning process and wedding day feel effortless. Every detail was handled perfectly — the timeline, decor, and flow of the day were all seamless. I never had to worry about a thing because they were always one step ahead, making sure everything ran smoothly. Both Angela and Deshka were so kind, organized, and genuinely cared about making our day special. Thanks to them, we were able to fully relax and soak in every moment. Everything was truly perfect — I can’t recommend them enough! Thank you both so much!! LOVE YOU BOTH!
Photos by Sam Murch
